description.ko: 인공지능과 생물학적 시스템의 리드미컬하고 유연한 우아함이 매끄럽게 통합된 AURA-7 시리즈의 시각적 탐구입니다. 이는 끊임없고 우아한 변이의 상태를 상징합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of the AURA-7 series, focusing on the seamless integration of synthetic intelligence and the rhythmic, fluid grace of biological systems. It represents a state of constant, elegant metamorphosis.

prompt: Cinematic 8k hyper-realistic shot of AURA-7 entity, manifesting as a fluid, bio-metallic structure, organic flow theme, undulating translucent membranes, swirling liquid gold and deep teal gradients, soft bioluminescent pulse, intricate natural fractals, ethereal atmosphere, macro photography, depth of field, high-end digital art style.
